name: mutcheck
purpose: Mutation-lite test-strength probe: applies small targeted mutations (< to <=, + to -, == to !=, True to False) to the lines you changed, reruns the tests, and reports mutations the tests FAILED to catch. A green suite that survives mutation is a weak suite. Scoped to the diff, strict budget, framed as a probe not a proof.
reach_for_me_when: your tests are green but you are not sure they would catch a bug in the code you just changed
you want to find the boundary/off-by-one cases your tests do not actually assert
you need evidence of test strength beyond line coverage

commands.name: check
commands.summary: Mutate changed lines, rerun tests, report survivors; optional --min-kill gate
